message.reasoning_content:
Let me parse this crochet pattern carefully.

**Project Title**: Mouse Cat Toy

**Materials**:
- Worsted/aran (#4) weight yarn in your choice of color
- 3.75 mm crochet hook
- Polyester fiber fill stuffing
- Dried catnip (optional)
- Stitch marker
- Yarn needle

**Confidence**: The pattern is clear and well-structured. I'll give it 0.98.

**Abbreviations**: All from the Abbreviations section:
- blo: back loop only
- ch: chain
- dc: double crochet
- dec: decrease (single crochet 2 together or invisible decrease)
- flo: front loop only
- hdc: half double crochet
- inc: increase (2 single crochet in one stitch)
- MR: magic ring
- sc: single crochet

**Parts**: There's only one part - the entire mouse body. Let me call it "Body" since there's no explicit part name given.

Now let me go through each round:

1. Round 1: MR, sc 6. (6) - normal round, targetStitchCount=6
2. Round 2: (sc, inc) x3. (9) - normal, targetStitchCount=9
3. Round 3: sc around. (9) - normal, targetStitchCount=9
4. Round 4: (sc 2, inc) x3. (12) - normal, targetStitchCount=12
5. Round 5: sc around. (12) - normal, targetStitchCount=12
6. Round 6: Complex ear-forming round. (18) - normal, targetStitchCount=18
7. Round 7: Ear-bending round. (12) - normal, targetStitchCount=12
8. Round 8: (sc, inc) x6. (18) - normal, targetStitchCount=18
9. Rounds 9-10: sc around. (18) - range expansion, rangeStartNumber=9, rangeEndNumber=10, targetStitchCount=18
10. Round 11: (sc 5, inc) x3. (21) - normal, targetStitchCount=21
11. Rounds 12-13: sc around. (21) - range, rangeStartNumber=12, rangeEndNumber=13, targetStitchCount=21
12. Round 14: (sc 6, inc) x4. (24) - normal, targetStitchCount=24
13. Rounds 15-17: sc around. (24) - range, rangeStartNumber=15, rangeEndNumber=17, targetStitchCount=24
14. Round 18: (sc 2, dec) x6. (18) - normal, targetStitchCount=18
15. Round 19: (sc, dec) x6. (12) - normal, targetStitchCount=12
16. "Add catnip and stuffing." - non-stitch instruction
17. Round 20: dec 3, ch 15, starting in 2nd ch from hook sc across chs, dec 3. (20) - normal, targetStitchCount=20
18. "Finish off and sew closed." - non-stitch instruction

Let me think about the summary for each round.

For Round 6, the instruction is quite detailed: "sc (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form first ear, sc 3 (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form second ear, sc 6 (both loops). (18)"

Summary: "Single crochet, work ear in front loops, sc 3, work second ear in front loops, sc 6."

For Round 7: "sc (both loops), bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 3 (both loops), bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 6 (both loops). (12)"

Summary: "Single crochet, bend ear forward and sc in back loop, sc 3, bend second ear forward and sc in back loop, sc 6."

Let me write the JSON now.

For range expansion rounds:

Rounds 9-10: rawInstruction = "sc around. (18)" - strip the "Rounds 9-10:" prefix
Summary = "Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rounds."

Rounds 12-13: rawInstruction = "sc around. (21)"
Summary = "Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rounds."

Rounds 15-17: rawInstruction = "sc around. (24)"
Summary = "Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for three rounds."

Let me build the full JSON.
